park_name: Fraser Coast Beachfront Tourist Parks | Burrum Heads

reviews.review_text: Parfait, gérant très sympathique et à l’écoute. Douche et cuisine très propre. Emplacement en face à même pas 10 mètres de la plage, je conseil fortement
Lovely spot, quiet area but plenty of services, shops, coffee, pub, petrol nearby. And the views are pretty nice too. Friendly team and very clean facilities.
Very nice park. Friendly staff. And very clean.
Really nice spot , handy to shops and dinning , older amenities but very clean , friendly staff , excellent price for powered sites
Friendly Staff. Great position. Right on the beach. Good walking spots. Close to shops.

Un camping avec un emplacement incroyable ! Un service vraiment parfait !! Avec toutes les commodités |D’une grande propreté  !! Et je voudrais encore remercier pour l’accueil et la gentillesse des propriétaires une dame chaleureuse et généreuse |Je recommande vraiment cet endroit vous pouvez y aller les yeux fermés
We have Torquay Beachfront caravan part its very clean and well maintained we can't wait to go back next year. 🙂

We stayed on a beach front site and it was absolutely beautiful. The facilities were clean and worked well. Shops, cafes and restaurants as well as the beach are all a stones throw away. It is right next to a road so you get some road noise but other than that it is an excellent spot to camp.

Outstanding!!!|Rocked in a camper van without a booking and snagged a powered site right on the beach. Waking up to the waves was perfect.|Site manager even offered to lock our e-bikes up in the equipment shed for added security.|The park is on a perfect part of Torquay Beach and the amenities were spotless.|Highly recommended!
Thoroughly enjoying our two weeks here in our van. Such a great spot and the managers do such a great job.

Lovely spot right on the beach
Wake up to the waves crashing at the shore
Good access to the Esplanade shops and markets
Great walking track along the esplanade

Torquay Hervey Bay...Beautiful clean park. Beach front.  No roads to cross. Clean facilities including camp kitchen and laundry. Very friendly, approachable Management who help park vans if required. Basic no frills 70s park. Just wonderful for a relaxing holiday.
3rd revisit to this great park. I’ll be back for a 4th!|Location is perfect. A hop skip & a jump to the beach  A+
Clean and tidy amenities. Centrally located on Esplanade. The sound of birds and shore break to wake up to each morning. It doesn't get much better than that.

Fantastic park with absolute beachfront and beautiful beach to swim in, facilities clean, staff extremely friendly !!! Great location away from the busy part of Hervey Bay , local foodworks walking distance and great bike tracks!!!

We had a lovely 5 night stay in this absolute beachfront caravan park. We swam in the calm ocean every day. While the park is old it is well kept and clean. Shops just across the road and a nice pub with great food 2 blocks away. Some hoon traffic about 9pm most nights but it didn't last too long.

What a beautiful park!  Right on the beach as well! It was so relaxing and quiet and direct access to the beach. Exactly what I was looking for. |The Park Managers and really friendly and helpful. They were able to accommodate an extra night for us at the last minute which I am very thankful for. They also keep the park and amenities in great condition. The kitchen areas and bathroom were pleasant to use. |I am already planning my next stay there.
A lovely park right on the beach. The facilities are cleaned daily and are clean. The staff and manager are all very friendly and helpful.
Lovely park in a beautiful location. We could pop to the beach, restaurants and shops so easily. The amenities were good and secure and safe as well.

★★★★★ (Feels like 6 ⭐️)

We honestly couldn’t have asked for a better stay at Fraser Coast Beachfront Tourist Park. The husband and wife managers are absolute legends — genuine, welcoming and they go above and beyond to make sure your stay is not just comfortable but truly special. Nothing was too much trouble and you can tell they genuinely care about their guests.

The park itself is fantastic. Beautifully maintained, spotless and well laid out. The amenities are exceptionally clean and modern, and everything is kept in top condition. It’s clear there’s real pride in the place.

The location is perfect — close to great local restaurants, shops and everything you need, while still offering a relaxed beachfront atmosphere.

We wouldn’t hesitate to recommend this park to anyone visiting the Fraser Coast, and we would stay again in a heartbeat. We also wouldn’t hesitate to recommend the current park managers for any position they choose to pursue — their professionalism, work ethic and genuine care for guests are outstanding.

Five stars isn’t enough — this was a six-star experience for us.

We have stayed at this tourist park twice in 4 years. Whenever we come to Hervey Bay, it just hits the spot right. The space on the caravan spots are generous, the amenities are always kept clean and have everything you need. You are a hop, skip and jump away from the beautiful beach and a short walk from Torquay jetty to have a fish! Thank you for always having us :)
Nice Place. Amenities a bit dated, however well maintained and clean. Great position, walk down the stairs and you are on the beach.|We will return
Great little tourist park, right on the water.  Kids loved having the beach straight outside their camper. Friendly managers, clean, tidy amenities.

Great campsite with clean amenities. The sites are quite large. It’s very convenient if you’ve booked a day trip to Fraser Island, as there is a bus stop where the Fraser Island companies usually pick people up.

Positiiviset:
- Rauhallinen ja viihtyisä ympäristö
- Kahviloita lähellä
- Oma puhdas ranta
- Hiljainen yöllä

Negatiiviset:
- WC tiloissa oli virtsan haju
Love this caravan park + Megan and Justin are super nice and helpful! Will be back

Great location, absolute beach front and close to the shops and restaurants. The park and amenities are clean and the staff are free. It's a great spot for a bike ride or a paddle or an easy swim. Just ensure you lock your bikes up with a good chain. Inspire of that we will be back for another stay in the new year.
Love the simplicity of the park, great views and breeze and clean
Ending up staying for 4 weeks,  it was fantastic, pool, spa, staff were fantastic
Very nice location with friendly helpful staff. Highly recommended.

Since the rebuild the sites are quite large. Enough room for a large van, awning and parking beside the awning, still with room around you. Roads are very wide to allow easy van backing. Toilet/showers/handbasin are combined in one room as ensuite arrangement. Large number in two locations. Very well kept green lawns and a good number of trees planted - still need another 5 years to get to full size. Shops and eateries accross the road.

Camping die erg vol wordt gezet, campers en caravans staan hutje mutje met nauwelijks ruimte ertussen. Weinig privacy. Sanitair is ok, maar erg verouderd. Ruimte om even je tanden te poetsen, is, net als de kampeerplaatsen, erg klein. Locatie is top, direct aan zee, met restaurants voor ieder budget binnen loopafstand.
We visit every year, always wonderful friendly staff, we are lucky enough to get a Beach side position,  lots of restaurants, takeaway and amenities close by

Recently stayed here - beachfront - and wow what a view to get up to each morning.  The park and facilities were clean.  The staff were lovely.  Campers were friendly.  Handy for  shops, pub and restaurants.
If we had one downside it was the hooners along the 40 km esplanade and not a police officer in sight.

Sadly a disgraceful out come for me and my quadraplegic friend yesterday after being recommend this park.On arrival the manager stated we would have to pay for 2 sites as we have a car towing a trailer .My friend has his car modified for him to sleep in as it has rails etc for him to adjust sleeping positions.I as this Carer sleep in a small rooftop tent ontop of a small trailer so therefore we have 2 dwellings.The manager was very adamant about this and therefore their was no point arguing about it.We certainly were not prepared to pay for 2 sites.We travel extensively around this beautiful country and this is the first time we have encountered anything like this.Hervey Bay council should be ashamed of themselves as should the Manager about this situation and the outcome.We sadly decided after this we would not stay in Burrum Heads and left the Shire altogether

Recently renovated park and facilities that are some of the best we have encountered.  Shout out to Kym & Sean (the Park Managers) and their staff. Very friendly, helpful and do a fantastic job of maintaining the grounds and amenities.
Highly recommend the Fraser Coast Beachfront Tourist Park at Burrum Heads, Queensland.

Although this was one of the pricier caravan parks we have stayed in, the phrase ' you get what you pay for ' is appropriate in this case. The ammenities were immaculate and one of the best designs we have seen. The grounds were beautifully maintained . We stayed in the Southern Pet friendly part of the park on a spacious site for our 22 ft caravan. Management,  which consisted of 2 couples, were very friendly and clearly took complete ownership of every detail pertaining to a clean, tidy and well run park.|A Foodworks store, Bakery , Butcher and  Bait & Tackle shop are conveniently located next to the park.|We will definitely be returning for another month next year.  Thanks for a great stay.

What a great place.Grounds 100 % Puppy friendly...So clean showers toilets...Staff just friendly..nothing a problem.
Had a week here.
Will be back 100 % all round
Well done guys
Bill and Roos and Lucy....puppy dog..😉😉

We spent easter with family and friends great park and friendly people . Then we stayed on after Easter with other friends all have a great time. Amenities always clean and fresh and park is extremely tidy and kept tidy always . The Managers are always friendly and helpful especialy  when putting the van onsite.|Thanks for a great holiday  see you again next year and in september cheers to Sean and kym and Nigel and fiona

Had a lovely stay, beautiful clean park. Unfortunately we were under a fig tree that gave lovely shade, but made a mess of our van and car. But would definately go back, but pick a different site.😄 PS the yellow lamp posts were brilliant, kept the mozzies away.

This was our first stay in a caravan park on our first trip, We’ll this park has made the standard extremely high we have to say as I can’t fault anything. The dog friendly section has good size lots the amenities were immaculate to say the least and Kym & Sean the perfect hosts very friendly and helpful |Could not recommend this park more highly |Thank you Neil $ Sam
It is an exellent park ,very clean well maintained . Toilet areas are very clean.                           Very friendly staff.

Just spent 5 days here at Burrum Heads in the upgraded Caravan Park.
The facilities are some of the best we have stayed at and highly recommend this park.
Thanks to Fiona & Nigel who greeted us and got us settled onto our site. They made sure everything was okay during our stay.
There are many shops next door which will cater for most of your needs.
We will certainly be back.
Great park with fantastic amenities. Clean and large sites. We stayed on a beachfront site and it was such a nice spot with amazing views and a great outlook.
Beautiful and well maintained caravan park. Managers are a pleasure to deal with.

The way the park is now set up is wonderful. |The staff are always on the go. They are attentive to the park and the guests.|The moment you arrive to and being helped to reverse in to your spot . To them lending a saw to cut up driftwood.||Just a awesome experience.
Very nicely renovated, Management team extremely friendly and helpful. Place was kept clean inviting.
Beautiful newly renovated park by the river with new amenities,  management were fantastic

We had our first stay in the park since the update and we are just blown away how much it has improved! Park managers are so lovely and helpful, and the help to guide you into your site is so amazing! Toilets and showers are so clean and so much nicer then they used to be! Cant wait to come back!

Congrats FCRC.  This park is beautiful.  Green,trees, Spacious sites Southside.  Immaculate amenities & camp kitchen.  Friendly caretakers.  Right next door to IGA who stock local produce, bakery, butcher, Fish & chips.  A+

Absolutely perfect spot. Close to the water, close to supermarkets and fish and chips. Literally next door.  The park managers are friendly and showed us to our site. If I could have 10 stars I would.
We loved our stay at Burrum Heads Holiday park. Everthing is so new and well maintained. Never seen anything like it on a camping. We felt very welcome. Recommendable 👍🏼
I beautiful park. Very Clean and organised. Hosts were tremendous
Shaun and Kym were very helpful towards us.  Location perfect.  Park is immaculate.
Great Caravan park right on the water.  Glorious breeze great service 👌

What a great park loved our recent stay even added a  night on the stay
Thanks
Right on the beach, clean and friendly, it was a wonderful place to stay.

This is it , the best place to stay in Hervey Bay,  just don't tell everyone.  It has great amenities and the staff are so friendly and accommodating it feels like my second home . It is close to everything, shops across the rd including a small supermarket if you forgot anything.  Highly recommend 👌

The office was locked when I arrived at 11:30 am. I phoned the contact number shown on the website but I could only leave a voicemail. I've waited for nearly 40 minutes and then left. The office was still closed and my voicemail was returned two hours later. Customer service doesn't exist in this place. I will never return to this caravan park.

We love coming to this park. Its position on the beach, the clean amenities, the friendly and attentive staff are worth the drive and we start to relax as soon as we arrive. Easy sites to get onto and great shops, coffee and parks within easy walk.
Ubicación excelente y servicios. Plazas grandes. Llegamos fuera de la hora de recepción y estaba todo explicado en un sobre. Muy bien
Stayed two nights at this location. Fantastic view of the ocean. Also close to all amenities at the park and the town. Walking distance to the beach and shops.

Great spot host was very helpful
Recommend the lady Elliott tour book through caravan park
Great location right on the beach and very near the Harvey Bay Surflifesaving Club. Clean amenities. Close to shops and restaurants. Popular so try to book early
A great place to stay short stay or longer, close to all cafes restaurants, hotel, waterfront views
Great location.  Tight sites but manager is happy to help

stayed 1 night in June, loved the site & booked that particular site for few days in Aug & paid in full(easy site access,  car parking off rd, less rd noise) the avail dates supplied by management. Arrived & advised that site was taken, offered smaller site at other end of park. Adjacent campers agreed to move their cars so we could get on-site, very tight! We declined, recieved partial refund & drove on. Happy to accept managements right to allocate sites as they want but really feel we should have been advised prior to arrival that someone else wanted that site more than we did & were given it!  We would've happily rebooked when that site was next available if we'd been advised. NOTE to others, common courtesy is a thing of the past & you don't always get what you want/pay for !

Staff were great
Amenities always spotless
Nice Sandy beach
If you get a spot in the front 2 rows, then 5 stars

But the row against the fence, don’t even bother, make sure u confirm which row you are in

Against the fence is 2 metres from the footpath, 3 metres from the road, which must have Qld share of hoons with extremely loud exhausts
Plus the crap from birds and trees on our new awning will take forever to clean.
These sites are so small no room to park your car, and if not for the staff help (Justin I think) I would still be trying to reverse in our van
Right on the waterfront close to the shops. Couldn’t ask for a better location. Perfect for that chill holiday

What a stunning place to stay. My favourite so far on the east coast. Friendly staff, great amenities and right on the beach! We parked up the van and went for a walk on the beach to find dolphins playing right in front of us! Magical. Would definitely recommend.
Great upgrade. Perfect location

After arriving with caravan, extended our stay for most of December.
Very impressed with the renewal of the park and the attention to detail and design. From the spacious sites, colour of the led lights for night, showers /ensuite like, location.
By far the best caravan park I have stayed in. Meticulously maintained by the staff.
Foodworks, bakery, butcher, take away fish and chips, fishing gear beside the park.  Tavern and Bowls Club nearby
Happy to pay the extra for a great stay.
great place, so quiet and relaxing. the upgrade facilities are well done. Staff are so welcoming and friendly. the town has great walkways to take in the views.
Wow what a great park. The location is excellent and the management team is outstanding. Can’t rate this holiday park highly enough.
Great park with excellent facilities and cannot fault the staff from start to finish. Definitely on our favourite park list.
Amazing park beautifully maintained staff are truly amazing 🤩 We will definitely be back thanks for a wonderful mini getaway 😁

What a great park. Recently upgraded, this park is grassy, very neat and the amenities are top notch. Caretakers are super friendly, brought us to our site.
Will be back! Thanks for having us!
Best and cleanest toilet and shower facilities I've seen.

This Caravan Park is our new go to place from now on. I can honestly say it has beautifully kept grounds and amenities 2nd to none. While we were there Nigel made us feel very welcome and of course our dog loved him. Everyday he would arrive with a treat for Rufus and visit each caravan that had dogs and gave them a treat. Two areas of the park, one side of the road was no dogs allowed and our side dog friendly sites. The river and beach are very close to the both park areas and it’s a casual stroll to enjoy a walk along the path. Handy to the park in walking distance is, Foodworks, Bakery, Butcher, Hairdresser, Fish and chip shop, and Bait shop. I can absolutely recommend this park ..
Friendly quick helpful check in. Spotless park with beautiful views and walks. Super clean amenities with your own secure cubicle. Easy walk to shops.
This was our first visit to Burrum Heads. Recently renovated the grounds and facilities. Our short stay was perfect great location, facilities and friendly staff. Thankyou we will be back

The caravan park is new, very clean and tidy. What a marvellous spot to stay overlooking the water.
The price is somewhat challenging but you get what you pay for.
I love Burrum Heads and having the park revamped is marvellous.
Lovely looking park. We wanted to stay for 1 night as we are just passing through but were told its a 5 night minimum. The park is empty, there'd be lucky to be 4 vans here!

Congratulations to Burrum Heads council for the renovations turning this site into a stunning CP. The ensuite style amenities blocks are immaculate, the grounds are thoughtfully laid out on a diagonal to maximize views on the Northside block. All staff are friendly and helpful.
It ticks most boxes & shoulnt disappoint
Very tidy and clean. Amazing views and managers very welcoming and accommodating. Walking distance to all places. Great spot

I really don't want to make this post as I don't want to encourage anyone else to know about this truly stunning spot. We try and not repeat trips, but this place keeps drawing us back.
I mean WOW. On the water, walk to everything you would possibly need and stunning views and sunsets. Just when i didn't think it could be any better, the dolphins did a swim-by yesterday afternoon. Do me a favour and don't come here, I want to be able to get in the next time I want to book.. 😁

Right on the waterfront. Food works store across the road. Other takeaway as well. Torquay pub just a  minutes walk away. Beautiful and quiet. Amenities clean and tidy.  Staff very helpful.  Couldn't rate this place any better. Well done guys and girls.
Great spot by the beach at Torquay. Never rains in Hervey bay ... Except always at Easter. Doesn't matter - even in a tent, it's worth it.
Older caravan park but facilities very clean staff lovely very helpful.
Yes your love

Lovely spot, good service. Could cool it with the amount of security cameras around the site, felt like I was on big brother. Bit of a stretch asking guests to mop the showers. Beautiful almost exclusive beach.

I have never been to a camp ground where the owners were this amazing. 2 out of 3 nights they came around with zooper doopers for the kids. Noticed that our ute wasn't at our site one night, so they followed up to make sure everything was secure and locked. I couldn't rate a place more highly.
Great place Jess and Darren great hosts

We have been coming here every year after Christmas for over 30 years. The caretakers Jess and Darren have been the best ever. They were both so very helpful and relaxed and did everything they could to make our holiday enjoyable. Everyone here feels the same way and wish that they would be here permanently. Thank you so much Jess and Darren we appreciate it.

Fantastic caravan site! Perfectly located just steps from the beach, offering stunning views and a relaxing atmosphere. The facilities are spotless, with well-maintained amenities. Site Managers Jess and Darren went above and beyond to ensure a great stay. Ideal for families or anyone looking for a peaceful coastal getaway. Highly recommend!

Die Lage des Campingplatzes ist direkt am Strand. Leider war unsere Site auch gleich direkt an einem Beach Access, sodass wir viele Personen gleich vor unserem Platz durchlaufen hatten. Auch waren die Waschmaschinen nicht mehr so sauber, die WC Anlagen dafür sehr schön. Die Stellplätze waren im Vergleich zu anderen Sites eher eng bemessen.
Noisy van park from traffic on esplanade, bit run down,not worth the small site  for price.
Right in the water, amazing views
Very noisy from esplanade traffic, needs bigger sites.

Frazer Coast Beach front Tourist Park. This campground has been fully renovated recently. I would say it is the gold standard in the Hervey Bay area. Management  is  doing a great job in keeping this ground clean and tidy. It has two beautiful and well-appointed undercover kitchens, including tables and benches to sit down and eat. Also, the amenities, toilets, and showers are well laid out and clean. We had a great time staying here and highly recommend this place.

Beautiful location right on the beachfront. Lovely beach for safe swimming. Helpful staff. Great sunset spot. Location is good for day trips to K'gari. Would definitely come back here again and recommend to others.

A great little caravan park with beach front sites available.
We were a row from the beach, and were thankful as it was quite windy during our stay. Enjoyed the radio that was on in the amenities block, which are very tidy. Thank you to the manager/owners who pay attention to the many details to keep a park looking good!
Spent the long weekend here with the little kids. Had a blast, will definitly be coming back in the near future
Spent a few nights with the van , great little clean park , friendly assistive staff , super close to a sheltered beach ,

We always wanted to stay at this place for many years before we purchased a caravan as its the best location in town.  Our first trip north from brisbane we had to make a booking, We managed to jag a spot along the beach front. Stunning views and early morning walks along the beach.

Came for a two-night stay, loved the grounds as they were kept very tidy at all times by the diligent staff, Justin and Megan. The common areas were always clean and there was never a wait for any amenities. The trees provided lovely natural shade and shelter from the wind. There are two access points right onto the beach and you can hear the waves softly at night to lull you to sleep... Megan very kindly sorted me out with a whale watching tour, organising the courtesy bus to pick me up and bring me back at the bus stop right out the very front. Bins were also easy to access.
Nice van Park, clean facilities, roomy sites, easy beach access.

Bit worn out, but facilities clean.
Frequently crowded
Location is very good. On thr beach yet close to shops restaurants. A shared pathway that runs the length of the foreshore runs right past.
Great caravan park  managers very nice Really  enjoy  our stay here
Fantastic little caravan park on the coast - you need to book. Has fantastic management who do all they can to be helpful

Stayed 14 nights at Torquay. We had a powered van site backing onto the beach. We booked a year in advance to ensure the site we wanted and it was a magic stay. Booked again for next year. Clean amenities and grounds  and Justin runs a tight ship. Easy beach walking and well kept level pathways above the beach. 100 metres from esplanade shops and services, so everything at hand in walking distance.
Great location, friendly staff, right on the beach, close to shops
Facilities could do with a good clean and refurbish. Bit crowded on some sites with no parking allocation.  Beautiful location
Very poor service booked in 12 months with a group and was put into the other side of the away from the group and they didn’t do anything to fix wouldn’t recommend there service in the office
Amazing location, sparkling clean facilities. Right on the beach, close to shops and playground and patrolled beach for swimming = great for kids. Also lots of trees for shade

Great spot, great enmities and very friendly staff.
We stayed in the newly renovated water front section.

Lovely newly refurbished park. Spacious sites and immaculate ammenities.
Manager very friendly and helpful.
Good spot for relaxing.
What a Iittle beauty. Exceptional toilet and laundry facilities. Such a nice spot to recharge your batteries. Absolutely loved our stay there.
Great place and brilliant staff...welcoming and very friendly..as good as any park we've stayed in anywhere...it's all very new of course so that probably helps. Very highly recommended..cheers

Lovely park, spacious sites, great location, staff were very friendly and amenities are fantastic - new and clean! They do close for cleaning daily but let you know when checking in. Will be back and keen to checkout the revamped waterfront area!

shaun and his bride are the most wonderful people.they are the park resident managers. other staff are very caring also.park itself is just renovated and is very well done. thanks you people for a lovely time. BAD BACK BOB AND LYN.

I witnessed the exchange of words 2 days ago and my recollection is  very different.  The most raised voice did not come from the Managers. Our interactions with the Managers has been nothing but cheerful and most welcoming, and that doesn't change from one stay to another. Your comment about a 10am checkout time puzzles me because we find that time to be the norm for most parks. Unfortunately their will never be a time for amenities to be cleaned where it doesn't cause inconvenience, but I bet we'd complain long and hard if they were cleaned hastily or not at all. Again the comment about being closed for hours puzzles me, the sign says closed 8.30am to 9.30am, in our last 11 days since entering the park, we've found an average time of around 9.10am or 9.15am and the amenities are open again. Of course when the beachfront side opens, the problem of amenities not being available at all times won't exist. So close now to this being the case. We were made very aware of the cleaning times upon checkin, can only imagine that all guests are given the same information. As for the relaxing of vans needing to be offsite by 10am, the Managers would need every bit of time they can get to have the sites ready by 12noon for the arrival of new guests. This park has a midday checkin time, unlike a lot of parks these days  checkin can be 2pm. We are fortunate.  Perhaps a stroll to the office asking for an extra half hour may have been appropriate. The Managers have yet to conquer the control of the weather, they'll have to work on that, but geez, it was highly publicised that the weekend was going to be filthy, you must have been aware as you would have driven in it. Emails unfortunately are the done thing, it is the way of the business world. Again when I wish to speak personally with management, they've always reacted to my quick email asking them to give me a buzz when convenient. Works for us.  Beautiful new park, perfect location, amazing amenities and accommodating Managers, pretty spot on in our eyes. By the way, your theatrical exit with spinning of tyres was enough to entice others from their vans to see what the heck was going on. Not a good look look you!! We hope you go on to find that perfect park on the water.
Nice park.

Managers are rude and not welcoming at all. The ONLY bathrooms close for cleaning at 8.30am and close for hours. 10am checkout for caravan sites is ridiculous. Rained the first two days we were there so enjoyed a slow morning coffee in the sun by the water on our last morning. 10.05am manager was up us yelling at us in front of everyone to get out on a Monday when the park was near empty. You would think they would be a little more chill considering we were packing up. Also they don’t take phone calls only emails, don’t see how that is running a caravan park. Can be the best location and best facility’s but bad management ruin a park. Heaps of other parks in the area right on the water go there.
Beautiful well organised park. Great location.

great place. very clean showers, toilets etc but closing them at 8.30 in mornings for cleaning when most people want to use them is annoying especially as no other toilets avaiable in the park.  . not all facilities are avaiable... re -camp kitchen. and very noisy with constuction still going on most of the day but still paying full price..

Absolutely lovely location.  Caravan allocation was spacious and well maintained,  amenities were spotless and the management team was wonderful in helping us placing the caravan.  Definitely saved a lively partner discussion on parking ability.  Close to shops and the fishing.  Will definitely be back soon ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️
Great location, generous grassed sites, fantastic amenities. The redevelopment is wonderful.
Caravan park, everything is new. Very well run. Super clean and tidy.
Website for bookings not reliable. Problem fixed. Just arrived at a very impressive park. $70 pn

First time we have stayed here after refurbishment.
Amenities are the best I have stayed at.
Grounds are immaculate.
Managers could not do enough for us.
They even help you position your van the sites are large.
Liked this park so much that we have booked again when we come back via this area.
What a fantastic caravan park, amenities are amazing, the grounds are very well maintained with plenty of shady trees. The managers are very friendly and the park is a credit to them.

We stayed here for 4 nights and absolutely loved it. The whole park has been recently renovated so all of the amenities are very fresh and clean, the whole place has turf so nice grass and trees throughout for shade. There is also a family/parents bathroom which was sooo handy for bathing my 4 month old too. The park manager is very lovely too, just an all round great park, HIGHLY recommend!
Despite bad weather it's a real bch town.ln nice weather it'd be great.
Ould retire at this place. Clean amenities and great customer service
Awesome location. Amenities in great keep and the best staff. Had a great stay. Thank you Justin & Megan
Great spot.
The park is right near the beach. Very clean and well run park

Ocean front views for $56 a night right next to the amenities and camp kitchen. Regular powered sites are even cheaper.
K’gari (Fraser island) blocked the wind making it soo calm and quiet
I will absolutely be back.
If in the area check out Fraser coast tourist parks there’s a couple more parks just like this one very close by. They’re all council owned parks on the beach with great prices I wouldn’t want to stay anywhere else

Booked a spot and could not get my carevan in as the spot in front shouldn't have been booked out. Moved from see view to non see view. Did not complain about it, so I understood that it was an error and move on .Then parked my Ute under a tree that no one was using as it was very hot and was in trouble for having it there. Wasn't asked in a propper manner to move it. It is standard to book nest years spot as I was told by the staff when the error was made a day ago to do it went in to do so thinking about it and want to move to a better spot checking availability on it once again not helped in a proper manner no we are not taking bookings for November nest year but yesterday I was asked to do so A great place to stay nice and clean but o boy the staff are not so great It's a shame that a great holiday that we waited on a hole year turned in to rubbish Will I come back nest year NO NEVER AGAIN
Camped in tents, great position on the beach front, very exposed to the wind. Noise from the street was intrusive. Staff friendly and helpful. Amenities were clean,eg. Bathroom and Camp Kitchen.

Ok, aber die Sanitären Anlagen waren wirklich in die Jahre gekommen und aus dem Duschkopf tropfte langsam und wenig Wasser.
Direkt am Abgang zum Strand ins Meer gehen die Rohre rein....

Nice campground, sites are pretty close together and quite small - if you have a large rig you may struggle. Access to the beach is great, bathrooms are clean although not a lot of hot water. Lots of noise from the road though, cars racing up and down the esplanade at all hours of the night.

Mooie plaats om te staan met een camper of tent. Momenteel waren er veel senioren. Deze mensen waren niet erg vriendelijk. Voor een jong stel of ouders met kinderen zou ik adviseren om verder te kijken.
Beautiful beachfront spot with a very friendly woman at front desk. The toilets were ok and pretty clean. The only negatives - it was quite loud but not completely through the night and no wifi.

I had a wonderful 4 night stay with my children and a few families over the school holidays.  We had a lovely beachfront site which was just fabulous. I loved the convenience to the shops and activities.     The managers are so friendly, helpful and well organised.  We'll be back next year.
:)
Very full campsite, we only stayed for one night and that was fine but wouldn't necessarily want to stay longer. The location was good, though.

The lady at the desk walked the extra mile with me. She helped me so much with my booking to Fraser Island and gave me all the time I needed.
Thank you so much you were respectful, helpful, pleasant and patient. Nettie
Will come and stay next time.
Hosts are great. Park good right on the beach.
Beautiful holiday park highly recommend  managers are awesome friendly people
Right on the Burrum river

This place is online “only”, which means they never answer the phone. I find it very hard to deal with people and places where you can’t just pick up the phone and talk directly to someone. And the prices have increased by 38% per day than what’s currently advertised.
We had an absolutely wonderful stay in this Park. The amenities were immaculate and the Staff very friendly and helpful. We will return. Highly recommended.

10/10 holiday spot! We were lucky enough to get the Beachfront site! It was amazing! Convenience of the supermarket across the road and a tasty fish and chip shop too. The staff were really friendly and the amenities were extremely clean and well maintained.
They are going to be doing renovations on the beachside in the near future so get in quick to book this amazing spot

Beautiful caravan park with friendly, helpful staff.
Amenities are very clean & well maintained.
Great location on the water.
We will certainly stay again.
November 2024
Have been coming here for a while. Lovely little hamlet. The hosts at the Caravan Pk Sean and Kym are hard workers and great people.

We absolutely loved our stay at Burrum Heads. Kym and Sean are wonderful, super friendly park managers. Everyday they were so thorough with their care and maintenance of the park. We cant wait to come back again one day in the future.

Nice park in a great location. Currently under renovation. Toilets are very clean. Dump point located across the road which is in the construction area. Close to town which has a good bakery, butcher, takeaway and food store. Park is not dog friendly

We stayed in our caravan at the Hillcrest Holiday Park. We loved our camp site. The amenities are old but cleaned daily. The walk along the Burrum River is very pleasant. Have stayed here many times and always enjoy Burrum Heads.
Beautiful place, great and very helpful staff, very clean amenities and beautiful sunsets.

Such a wonderful caravan park and wonderful Managers Sean and Kym 😁 So close to the river and shops it is and was perfect 😁 clean tidy park and Sean knew everyone by name helped with parking your van ....thank you 👍
Amazing sunsets and right on the water. Good facilities and Sean is very accommodating for getting your van parked without issue. Plenty of fishing and easy access for SUP's / boats....

Absolutely the best caravan park to stay in. Well maintained grounds with attention to detail. Amenities are spotless, not even a cobweb on the ceiling. People running the park are super friendly, even guide you into your site and offer any advice or assistance. Will definitely be back
Great week at Burrum Heads. Very clean and maintained, amenities spotless. Managers very helpful and friendly. Had a great time with other people in the park.

16th year at this park. 10 week stays when able. This is now under review due to council policy. The current managers and relief are staff are people that are a pleasure to meet. The grounds are in 1st class order, amenities as you would want at home. Waste bins are constantly changed and cleaned. Rear section of the park is being renovated and number of sites reduced. There is to be a allocation or a ballot for these sites i am led to believe . Council is to contact previous tenants in the months ahead. Council does not wish to be seen to give preference to any person so it will be interesting to see what prevails.
Park is clean and tidy but amenities are old and small need replacing with upgraded facilities for the number of sites
Nice and clean friendly staff ,but keep all your valuables  locked up .unfortunately we were relieved of some of our camping equipment during the night

In this caravan park be prepared to be packed in like sardines in a can. Getting your van in and out of its allocated slot is next to impossible without help.
Location and amenities are just fine and it’s great to be right next to the beach.
Very good

Was put on a corner block on the beach front site we had to park on the wrong side of the concrete slab because a caravan had parked there car where I was supposed to put my camper so we had to park on the wrong side and open up half on the concrete slab it was hard to get out as there was another van parked on the next site in front of us it was school holidays and that end were picked like sardines
Location is good but sites are small and had issues with hot water .
Right on the beachfront and great views to watch the sunsets
Great location , right on the beach and a short walk to shops. Friendly and very helpful staff. Clean , quiet and relaxing park. Highly recommend

We recently stayed for 4 days. Our first time to Burrum Heads and what a gem of a place. This is one of the most well kept parks we have stayed at. The amenities were spotless ever day. Managers Sean & Kim are friendly and really make an effort so your stay at their park is enjoyable. Adam & Kathryn

Thank you Kim and Sean for all that you do & your thoughtfulness to make our stay at Burrum Heads Beachfront Park a wonderful place to spend our 6 week holiday. The amentities are always so immaculately clean and fragrant and the grounds are the best they've ever been . Thank you to Nick and Rachael for your consideration of guests when you are about to clean the vacated sites and general maintenance and also for enabling Sean & Kim to have a break . You all make a great team! We will miss it next year but we're most grateful to have been able to continue to have a wonderful holiday with friends we've met over the years . The atmosphere in the park was wonderfully friendly which is a reflection of Sean & Kim & Nick & Rachael . With appreciation, Bernard & Julie
Great spot. Amenities spotless. Kym and Sean very helpful and friendly. Loved the waterfront and short walking distance to swimming beach.

My family and I recently had the pleasure of staying at this impeccable caravan park. From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with warmth and hospitality by Kym, Sean, Nick and Rachael, who were not only professional but also genuinely caring.

The grounds were meticulously maintained, and the facilities were impeccably clean. Everywhere we looked, there was evidence of the hard work and dedication put into ensuring the park was tidy and welcoming. It was evident that the management took great pride in their establishment and worked well as a team, and it reflected in every aspect of our stay.

Overall, our stay at this caravan park was nothing short of exceptional. We can't wait to return!

This truly is a beautiful place....hopefully the changes we were told about won't happen....sights changing and a ballot system.....come on Fraser coast council pull your heads in and leave something alone.....
Absolutely great place, we love coming up this way every year
Great place  to be.. Toilets and showers very clean and tidy. Managers are fantastic.
Lovely park. The amenities are so clean . The managers are lovely.  Gorgeous views. An excellent Food works , across the road.Highly recommend staying here.

Sites 1 to 10 are a must in summer if you don’t have aircon! Nice along the river on high tide. Good fishing spot but not the best swimming. Would be great if park had a pool. Bakery and Butcher across the road are great. Nice walks along the front. Sites are very tight to get into at river side but nice and open across the road if you have a big van. Toilets and showers are very good and clean. If you stay here with a boat there is no space with the sites for a boat at the front but again along the back is roomier.
Great spot right on the water. Amenities were clean and modern. Staff were very helpful and friendly, I recommend a stay here.
Beautiful beach, great playground with shops across the road.
Great location,  friendly staff. Sites were a decent size but the roads between the sites are very narrow so it makes it difficult to get your van in

Top spot,if the northerly winds are not forcast,try to get a front (on the river)spot.
There's is no better in Australia,excellent managers,and the amenities are spotless ,10 star.

We had a great stay recently at this caravan park. Thanks to Nathan & Kylie, great job. Location backing onto the river, beautiful sunsets, very tidy park. Facilities were very clean, everyone seemed friendly, will definitely be visiting again.
Caravan sites small.  Very hard to get van into.
